sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50697" key="i(ppela/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱππ-ελάτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n50697.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">driver</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rider of horses</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:95" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.95</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
